message:
feat(history): persist agent types per entry and filter history by agent type

Add AgentTypes field to HistoryEntry so each send/replay/palette dispatch
records which agent types (claude, codex, gemini, etc.) received the prompt.
History queries now filter by agent type using both persisted metadata and
live tmux pane lookups as fallback. Stats mode runs after all filters
(since, pane, agent-type) instead of before, so --stats honours the same
filters as entry listing. Robot capability metadata for the history command
switches to canonical unprefixed flag names (--pane, --type, --last, --since,
--stats, --limit, --offset) and the dashboard replay path records agent
types and writes history only after execution completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1697,15 +1697,18 @@ func buildCommandRegistry() []RobotCommandInfo {
 			Description: "Get command history for a session.",
 			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
 				{Name: "session", Flag: "--robot-history", Type: "string", Required: true, Description: "Session name"},
-				{Name: "history-pane", Flag: "--history-pane", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter by pane ID"},
-				{Name: "history-type", Flag: "--history-type", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter by agent type"},
-				{Name: "history-last", Flag: "--history-last", Type: "int", Required: false, Description: "Show last N entries"},
-				{Name: "history-since", Flag: "--history-since", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Show entries since time"},
-				{Name: "history-stats", Flag: "--history-stats", Type: "bool", Required: false, Description: "Show statistics instead of entries"},
-				{Name: "robot-limit", Flag: "--robot-limit", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "0", Description: "Max history entries to return (alias: --limit)"},
-				{Name: "robot-offset", Flag: "--robot-offset", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "0", Description: "Pagination offset for history entries (alias: --offset)"},
-			},
-			Examples: []string{"ntm --robot-history=myproject --history-last=10"},
+				{Name: "pane", Flag: "--pane", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter by pane ID"},
+				{Name: "type", Flag: "--type", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter by agent type"},
+				{Name: "last", Flag: "--last", Type: "int", Required: false, Description: "Show last N entries"},
+				{Name: "since", Flag: "--since", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Show entries since time"},
+				{Name: "stats", Flag: "--stats", Type: "bool", Required: false, Description: "Show statistics instead of entries"},
+				{Name: "limit", Flag: "--limit", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "0", Description: "Max history entries to return"},
+				{Name: "offset", Flag: "--offset", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "0", Description: "Pagination offset for history entries"},
+			},
+			Examples: []string{
+				"ntm --robot-history=myproject --last=10",
+				"ntm --robot-history=myproject --since=1h --type=claude",
+			},
 		},
 		{
 			Name:        "replay",
